narrative:
Massillon municipal court district has 91,675 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Republican lean of 5.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -2.6% D−R vs -8.6% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
